items.title: Anthropic just proposed taxing itself to pay for the jobs its AI destroys
items.summary: “The key challenge in such a world won’t be incentivizing growth, but finding a way for everyone to share in the benefits,” Dario Amodei wrote.
items.titleZh: Anthropic刚刚提议对自己征税，以支付其人工智能摧毁的工作
items.summaryZh: 达里奥·阿莫迪写道：“在这样一个世界里，关键的挑战不是激励增长，而是找到一种让每个人都能分享利益的方法。”。

items.title: Xiaomi gets approval to build extended-range EVs, plans full-size SUV to rival Li Auto
items.summary:
China’s Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT) granted Xiaomi regulatory approval to produce extended-range electric vehicles (EREVs), clearing a key hurdle for the company’s expansion beyond battery-only EVs.
The approval paves the way for Xi…

items.title: Chevron’s CFO on why finance chiefs are defining AI’s business value
items.summary: Eimear Bonner, a former CTO, explains how the finance organization is using AI.
items.titleZh: 雪佛龙首席财务官谈为什么财务主管们正在定义人工智能的商业价值
items.summaryZh: 前首席技术官Eimear Bonner解释了该财务组织如何使用人工智能。

items.title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
items.summary: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.
items.titleZh: 伊朗威胁埃隆·马斯克在中东的公司：伊朗国家媒体
items.summaryZh: 据伊朗官方媒体报道，伊朗将把埃隆·马斯克在中东的所有公司视为军事目标，以报复美国。

items.title: It's not SpaceX. Bitcoin ETF outflows may be an arbitrage story
items.summary: Sygnum CIO Fabian Dori says recent bitcoin ETF outflows are more likely tied to arbitrage unwinds and macro liquidity pressures than investors rotating into anticipated IPOs such as SpaceX.
items.titleZh: 这不是SpaceX。比特币ETF外流可能是一个套利故事
items.summaryZh: Sygnum首席信息官Fabian Dori表示，与投资者转向SpaceX等预期的IPO相比，最近比特币ETF的外流更有可能与套利解除和宏观流动性压力有关。

items.title: While investors await the SpaceX IPO, these space stocks are already public, building an economy in Earth orbit—and beyond
items.summary: In addition to rocket companies that launch payloads into orbit, others in the sector develop satellites and vehicles or provide space-based services like communications or imagery.
items.titleZh: 在投资者等待SpaceX首次公开募股的同时，这些太空股票已经上市，在地球轨道上以及更远的地方建立了经济
items.summaryZh: 除了将有效载荷发射到轨道上的火箭公司外，该行业的其他公司还开发卫星和飞行器，或提供通信或图像等天基服务。

items.title: AI bubble fears are spreading, even as SpaceX readies the biggest IPO ever
items.summary: On the day SpaceX prices the largest stock-market debut in history, the market underneath it has a case of nerves. The cause is not rockets. It is AI. Several warning lights are flashing at once. Together they amount to the first serious test of a trade that …
items.titleZh: 人工智能泡沫的担忧正在蔓延，尽管SpaceX准备进行有史以来最大的IPO
items.summaryZh: 在SpaceX为历史上最大的股票市场首次公开募股定价的那天，它下面的市场感到紧张。原因不是火箭。是AI。几个警告灯同时闪烁。它们共同构成了对贸易的第一次严重考验…

items.title: Gordon Ritter: I predicted AI’s learning loop a decade ago. The doomers are still measuring the wrong thing
items.summary: The companies winning aren't replacing human judgment — they're capturing it. The ones losing are letting it drain away.
items.titleZh: Gordon Ritter：我十年前就预测了人工智能的学习循环。傻瓜们还在测量错误的东西
items.summaryZh: 获胜的公司并没有取代人类的判断——他们正在捕捉它。失败的公司正在让它流失。

items.title: As OpenAI leans into enterprise business, Apple and Google set sights on the masses
items.summary: OpenAI's aggressive push into the enterprise, where it competes with Anthropic, coincides with efforts by Apple and Google to bring advanced AI to consumers.
items.titleZh: 随着OpenAI向企业业务倾斜，苹果和谷歌将目光投向了大众
items.summaryZh: OpenAI积极进军企业领域，与Anthropic竞争，这与苹果和谷歌将先进的人工智能带给消费者的努力相吻合。

items.title: U.S.-Iran hostilities escalate, Oracle's fundraising plans, $100,000 colleges and more in Morning Squawk
items.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
items.titleZh: 美国与伊朗的敌对行动升级，甲骨文的筹款计划，Morning Squawk的10万美元大学和更多
items.summaryZh: 以下是投资者开始交易日需要知道的五件关键事情。

items.title: SpaceX IPO won’t ‘break’ the bull market. But investors are worried about what comes next
items.summary: As far as Wall Street is concerned, the stock market has what it takes to absorb the new supply.
items.titleZh: SpaceX的首次公开募股不会“打破”牛市。但投资者担心接下来会发生什么
items.summaryZh: 就华尔街而言，股市有能力吸收新的供应。

items.title: SpaceX soon-to-be millionaires are set to spend big on luxury homes, watches and private jet travel
items.summary: SpaceX employees have to wait to sell their shares, but many are already planning how to spend their windfalls.
items.titleZh: SpaceX即将成为百万富翁，将在豪宅、手表和私人飞机旅行上投入巨资
items.summaryZh: SpaceX的员工不得不等待出售他们的股票，但许多人已经在计划如何使用他们的意外之财。

items.title: GM just updated 250,000 EVs to sell power back to the grid
items.summary: GM has already put the basics in place. Roughly 250,000 of its electric vehicles on US roads can perform bidirectional charging – power can flow into the battery and back out again. That has mostly meant keeping the lights on at home during an outage. Now GM …
items.titleZh: 通用汽车刚刚更新了25万辆电动汽车，将电力卖回电网
items.summaryZh: 通用汽车已经做好了基础工作。在美国道路上行驶的大约25万辆电动汽车可以进行双向充电——电力可以流入电池并再次流出。这主要意味着在停电期间保持家里的灯亮着。现在GM…
